description_long: This is a modern grave monument set within a rectangular, tiled plot bordered by a dark stone frame. The grave features a two-part upright headstone: one section is polished black stone with engraved inscriptions and a cross, while the other is a lighter, textured stone slab. The grave bed is covered with a matching light stone slab, slightly elevated above the tiled ground. The headstone and grave bed are mounted on a raised platform, giving the monument a layered, geometric appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a strong contrast between the black and light stone elements. The monument is intended for a single burial and is typical of contemporary cemetery plots.
description: A modern grave monument with a black and light stone headstone, set on a tiled rectangular plot with a raised stone slab. The design is minimalist and geometric, featuring engraved inscriptions and a cross.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-part upright headstone, with the black engraved section and the lighter stone slab side by side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the grave bed and the layered platform structure beneath the headstone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inscriptions and cross on the black headstone, as well as the full tiled plot and raised grave bed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth of the headstone and the rectangular layout of the grave plot.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: Miłość obiega to zawsze, by znów być blisko Ciebie
